summary: The diff modifies OrbitDock.tsx and HomePage.tsx to implement the requested interaction changes. All four requirements appear to be addressed based on the available evidence, though the diff is truncated so full implementation details cannot be confirmed for every acceptance criterion.

hallucinated_features.description: Upload idle pulse animation every 8–10 seconds (uploadPulseActive state and timer)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any idle pulse animation for the Upload icon. This appears to be an unrequested micro-interaction feature added to OrbitDock.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: Mission 'just activated' micro-interaction (missionJustActivated state and timer)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any special activation animation for the Mission icon specifically. This is an extra micro-interaction not in any requirement.
